notes: Run commands from the repository root with the gpm entrypoint available.
Do not commit data/raw/ or full data/processed/ global builds.
Sample subsets may be committed under samples/ when size is modest.

steps.notes: Raw data stays under data/raw/ (gitignored). Dry-run omits --execute.
